prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: EVR-ROUNDDUFFE23L-BLK Product Type: DUFFEL_BAG Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 18 inch Square Duffel Bag Adjustable Shoulder Strap Travel 20 Liter Description: Travel in style with the ASR Outdoor 18" Black Square Duffel Bag.

This classic duffel bag measures 18" x 8" x 9", making it a great travel bag for going to the gym, overnight trips or camping. It has one spacious main zippered compartment that has a carrying capacity of up to 20 liters

The bag also features a padded hook and loop fastener top carry handle as well as dual side grab handles for easy portability. It's constructed of durable 600D polyester that is water resistant to protect your belongings during travel and was made with professionally weaved seams that will ensure long-lasting use. The trendy matte black color is suitable for most fashion styles. This is a must-have duffel bag for campers, athletes and travel enthusiasts. Search Terms: travel bags outdoor duffels gym totes duffel carriers water resistant canvas polyester adjustable design messenger bag hiking gear camping overnight slumber parties sleepover backpacks shoulder Features: - CLASSIC MATTE BLACK COLOR - Suitable for Most Fashion Styles; Great for Travelers, Athletes and Campers - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of Water Resistant 600D Polyester to Protect Belongings; Professionally Weaved Seems Ensure Long-term Use - SPACIOUS STORAGE - Square Duffel Bag Measures 18" x 8" x 9" Carry Capacity of up to 48 Liters - Easily Holds Shoes, Change of Clothes and More - VERSATILE DESIGN - Dual Side Grab Handle and Top Carry Handle with Padded Hook & Loop Fastener Provide Optimal Portability === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
